title: Growth Hormone Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
IGF-1 in the blood. 
IGBP-3 test. IGBP-3 is a protein that is the main carrier of IGF-1. This test can help diagnose a GH deficiency, GH insensitivity (when your body can't use the growth hormone it makes), or GH excess. 
References 
Brinkman JE, Tariq MA, Leavitt L, et al. Physiology, Growth Hormone. [Updated 2023 May 1; cited 2024 May 27]; [about 4 screens]. In: StatPearls [Internet]. Treasure Island (FL): StatPearls Publishing; 2024 Jan-. Available from: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK482141/
